case_title: PARISA MOSAVIAN DDS VS. MASSACHUSETTS MUTUAL LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT THE COMMISSIONER OF THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INSURANCE'S DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF PARISA MOSAVIAN. RULING: NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MASSACHUSETTS MUTUAL LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER OVERRULED, IN PART, AND SUSTAINED, IN PART. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD THE FRAUDULENT MISREPRESENTATION WITH GREATER PARTICULARITY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT THE COMMISSIONER OF THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INSURANCE'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Karen W. Yiu, Esq. Deputy Attorney General, State of California, appearing for Defendant, Commissioner of the California Department of Insurance. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with thirty days leave to amend. The Commissioner shall have 30 days thereafter to file a responsive pleading. Order signed in Open Court(302/CWW/JW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MASSACHUSETTS MUTUAL LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer overruled, in part, and sustained, in part. Demurrer overruled as to the first and second causes of action. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the third cause of action. Plaintiff to plead the fraudulent misrepresentation with greater particularity. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/JW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Pltf'S First Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of P/A In Support Thereof.
Off Calendar Jan-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STUART CAMPBELL'S Demurrer and Demurrer To Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained with leave to amend. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/VC) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
